title: Window Boy Would Also Like to Have a Submarine
original_title: Chico ventana también quisiera tener un submarino
overview: Aboard a cruise ship out at sea, a young sailor discovers a door mysteriously leading to an apartment in Montevideo. Meanwhile, a group of Asian farmers find an abandoned shed in the valley, attributing it supernatural powers.
